_comment: Client intake brief — the ONLY per-tenant input Seat 1 needs. Copy to seeds/<client>/brief.json, fill every <...> placeholder with the real client, then run the author-template skill. Fields marked (human) cannot be invented by an agent and must come from real tools or the client.

client.name: <Client name>
client.product: <what the site sells / the conversion, e.g. a subscription or booking>

axis._comment: (human) The enumerable data axis behind the pages — a city, a product, a date, a number/spec pair. No axis → decline. The unit below is illustrative; replace with the client's real axis.
axis.enumeration: <how it enumerates, e.g. 63 provinces × N categories>
axis.facts_source: <real per-page fact source, e.g. the client's API / dataset>

keywords._comment: (human) Real query data — export from Keyword Planner / GSC / Ahrefs. Sample rows show the format only; put the full CSV alongside as keywords.csv.

serp_refs._comment: Top-ranking URLs for 3–5 target queries; the agent reads these to derive the schema.

hub_and_spoke.sibling_rule: <how each spoke picks its 3–4 siblings, e.g. 3 nearest by same category>

voice.persona: <who is speaking, e.g. a calm domain expert, not a hype channel>
voice.tone: <tone, e.g. factual, ngắn gọn, không giật tít>

rollout.golden_set: <golden-set scope, e.g. 8–15 items spanning the axis, review_sample_pct 100>
rollout.refresh: <refresh cadence, e.g. facts re-posted on change (hash regenerates); prose refresh via template_version>
